snippet.title: Danijela Ň†tajnfeld za Insajder: Htela sam da izbegnem da otkrijem ime, ali je jedna kap prelila ńćaŇ°u
snippet.description:
‚ÄúMene je silovao moj kolega i dragi prijatelj Branislav Leńćińá, u maju 2012. godine. Posle ńćetiri dana igrali smo predstavu. Bila sam u Ň°oku. Htela sam odmah da zovem policiju, ali sam razmiŇ°ljala Ň°ta ńáe se desiti. Morate da razumete to stanje‚Äú, kaŇĺe u ekskluzivnom intervjuu za Insajder glumica Danijela Ň†tajnfeld.
Danijela Ň†tajnfeld je iz Njujorka gde Ňĺivi veńá godinama, doputovala u Beograd kako bi dala izjavu tuŇĺilaŇ°tvu, a u opŇ°irnoj ispovesti za Insajder glumica prvi put pred kamerama opisuje sam dogańĎaj koji se odigrao u maju 2012.

TEKST:
Intro:
trebace mi nocas tvoja mala
ajde sad dovedi je do stana
bice tu kod mene sedam dana
pice samo vino i sampanjac

ajde bani, tu su mi drugari e 
kosu zavi, popi malo, stani e
casu nali, na mene navali e
pa uradi, sto nisi smela ranije

Al sad vozi me laganie

Ref:
vozi me laganije x3
pa uradi sto nisi smela ranije

Strofa:
tvoje oci gledaju me sad, bomba 
kazes kako hoce sa mnom sve, da probas
flasa vec je prazna trebace, nam  nova 
da se sada skines ne treba, mi lova

mi lova, mi lova
da se sada skines ne treba, mi lova
mi lova, mi lova
a cak i da neces doci ce, mi nova

snippet.description:
NajbrŇĺe rastuńái portal u Srbiji https://www.alo.rs/

Vuk je doŇ°ao svojim automobilom i poneo korpu za bebu, dok je njegova majka Nena Gojkovińá doŇ°la u pratnji sina Tadije i druge snaje Kristine.

Kako je "Alo!" prvi ekskluzivno saznao, verenica Vuka Moba, Olivera Konatar, porodila se pre tri dana u Narodnom frontu prirodnim putem i na svet donela zdravu devojńćicu kojoj su dali ime Teona.

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia‚Äč‚Äč

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-‚Äč‚Äč...

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list‚Äč‚Äč...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram‚Äč‚Äč
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook‚Äč‚Äč
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial‚Äč‚Äč
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter‚Äč‚Äč
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube‚Äč‚Äč

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äč #FutureNostalgia‚Äč #Grammys

snippet.title: DAVID RADOSAVLJEVIC x DRIA - DIOR (Official Video)
snippet.description:
DAVID RADOSAVLJEVIC x DRIA - DIOR
David i Dria Booking & info: +38163606609 Sasa Matejic

Muzika: Neven IN VIVO
Tekst: Neven IN VIVO
Aranzman: Patriarch
Mix i Master: TOZLA

Video by Visual Fever
https://www.instagram.com/visual.fever.studio

Specijalno hvala event centru Club City Hall na nesebicnoj pomoci pri realizaciji spota
https://www.instagram.com/clubcityhall

David Radosavljevic instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/radosavljevicdavid

Dria instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/_dria.1_

Patriarch instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/patriarch_x6x

Tozla instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/tozla

Neven IN VIVO instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/neven_invivo

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Mala moze casove da daje,
Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,

snippet.title: ROS√Č - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It‚Äôs funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry‚Äôs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won‚Äôt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.
